_readme: Owner-authorized dated raises of the daily operational spend ceiling. Keys are UTC dates; each raise applies to exactly that day and expires with it - the guard falls back to the standing ceiling on every other date. This file is the sanctioned alternative to --override-budget, which stays forbidden in ops practice: the authorization must travel with the repo, dated and reasoned, or the fire refuses.

2026-07-23.reason: owner raised the ceiling to $5 for the advice-arm build day (session chat 2026-07-22): registered-set completion, completed-thought set, provisional judge pass, hedge remainder, paraphrase floor, dialect +30
